title: EP Primer with Daniel E. Schott
titleLine: EP PRIMER WITH DANIEL E. SCHOTT—Live
blurb: An EP Primer with Daniel E. Schott, a first-time Executive Producer — playing right now on INTERDEPENDENT.
_help: CONTROL FILE for interdependent.tv. active:true takes over the channel within ~15s. warning:true runs the WARNING takeover overlay (full-screen card at start + every 10 min; ticker crawl at the 5-min mark). recorded:true + anchorMs = simulated-live VOD. active:false returns to the standing schedule. Deploy: wrangler pages deploy . --project-name=interdependent-tv --branch=main
